content:
✔ Types of Chaos Events Based on Visibility:
• Public Chaos Events (Everyone knows it’s coming) → Ex: “Next week, a prophecy will be fulfilled.”
• Hidden Chaos Events (Only select players know) → Ex: “A secret player has activated an event—its effects will be revealed later.”
• Immediate Chaos Events (Happen without warning) → Ex: “The Monkey’s Paw grants a wish NOW.”

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents students from feeling completely out of control.
✔ Encourages long-term strategic planning.
✔ Allows for maximum surprise factor while maintaining fairness.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 8.3

1. How Many Transformative Paths Should Exist Per Semester?

✔ Should there be 1-2 per path per semester, or should every student have the chance to take one?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 495 (chunk 495/555)
